properties.remark: HIGHWAY 12 NEAR KAMIAH, IDAHO IS CLOSED DUE TO A LANDSLIDE.
ROCK AND DEBRIS HAVE SLID DOWN ONTO THE ROAD CAUSING THE INTERSECTION OF FOYS CANYON ROAD, PATRICK CREEK ROAD AND AIRPORT ROAD TO CLOSE.
GUSTS BETWEEN 50 AND 60 MPH. SMALL LIMBS BROKEN OFF WILLOW TREE.

TREES DOWN ON BOTH SIDES OF US 12 FOR A TWO MILE STRETCH FROM THE KAMIAH BRIDGE TO ROCK ROAD. IN ADDITION, A SMALL CAMPER WAS DESTROYED BY A FALLING TREE IN A NEARBY CAMPGROUND. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR. DELAYED REPORT.
Power lines down across roadway. Multiple trees down. Several across road and blocking traffic.
MINOR TREE DAMAGE REPORTED.
CHOKECHERRY TREE DOWN ON PRIVATE PROPERTY. LOTS OF HEAVY, INTENSE PEA-SIZED HAIL AND BRIEF OUTFLOW WINDS REPORTED WITH STORM.
REPORT FROM FACEBOOK. PHOTO SHOWS HAIL RANGING FROM PEA-SIZED, UP TO THE SIZE OF QUARTERS. NO DAMAGE REPORTED.
REPORT IS FROM SPOT MOUNTAIN LOOKOUT.
REPORT CAME THROUGH SOCIAL MEDIA.
REPORT CAME THROUGH SOCIAL MEDIA.
MOST HAIL WAS NICKEL, QUARTER SIZES. HAIL ACCUMULATION ON NEARBY HIGHWAY 95 RESULTED IN A ONE VEHICLE SLIDE-OFF.

RADAR ESTIMATED EVEN LARGER HAIL JUST EAST OF LUCILE.

US HIGHWAY 95 CONTINUES TO REMAIN CLOSED CLOSED THIS MORNING (08/10) DUE TO A MULTIPLE MUDSLIDES THAT BLOCKED PORTIONS OF THE HIGHWAY BETWEEN MILEPOSTS 197 TO 205. A DEBRIS FLOW IMPACTED US HIGHWAY 95 AT FIDDLE CREEK.
MATURE PONDEROSA PINE TREE SNAPPED OFF ABOUT 30 FT UP. ANOTHER LARGE PONDEROSA PINE BLOWN OVER.
PHOTO RETRIEVED FROM SOCIAL MEDIA.

REPORTED AT 235 MEADOW VIEW DR, BUTTE MT... SPOTTER CINDY CROM CALLED ON BEHALF OF A FRIEND AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED. THEY GOT GOLF BALL SIZED HAIL THAT LASTED FOR ABOUT 3 MIN, THEN HEAVY RAIN. THEY REPORTED DAMAGE TO VEHICLES AND ROOF. CINDY SAID SHE ONLY GOT HEAVY RAIN AT HER HOUSE.
A 30 FOOT BRANCH FELL OFF A PONDEROSA PINE TREE. 0.80 INCHES OF RAINFALL AND PENNY SIZE HAIL. POWER OUTAGE OCCURRED AS STORM ROLLED THROUGH. DELAYED REPORT.
A TREE FELL ON A POWERLINE NEAR THE CROSS STREETS OF COWCATCHER DRIVE AND US-12. THE CALL CAME IN AT 4:14 PM, BUT LSR TIME WAS ESTIMATED BY RADAR.
A PONDEROSA PINE TREE, APPROXIMATELY 2 FEET IN DIAMETER FELL ON A CAR ON BLUE MOUNTAIN ROAD. TIME IS ESTIMATED WITH A NEARBY OBSERVATION.
AMBIENT WEATHER WS-2090 STATION AT A PRIVATE RESIDENCE. FOUND ON WUNDERMAP.COM.
A TREE FELL AND BLOCKED THE STREET. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR AND NEARBY OBSERVATIONS.
A BRANCH FELL ON TWO CARS NEAR THE CROSS STREETS OF 9TH AND GRANT ST. THERE WERE ALSO MEDIA REPORTS OF A TREE THAT FELL ON A HOUSE AND ALSO ON A SHED IN ORCHARD HOMES. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

DOWNED TREE ACROSS GHARREET ST AROUND 1/2 MILE SOUTH OF RESERVE ST.
